title: sabazia durangensis
intro: Sabazia durangensis, also known as Mountain Bluet, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sabazia durangensis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Sabazia durangensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
